channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: 2026 FIFA World Cup schedule and viewing guide
item.description: With 104 World Cup games across the U.S., Canada and Mexico, it's like 'a Super Bowl every day for five weeks,' says U.S. captain Tim Ream.

item.title: Buttigieg targeted by false child protective services report
item.description: Michigan State Police confirmed that a report against Pete Buttigieg was found to be unsubstantiated and false.

item.title: Iran live updates: US strikes on Iran after Strait of Hormuz drone attack
item.description: U.S. forces conducted strikes on Iran on Friday in response to an Iranian drone attack on a Singapore-flagged cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: At least 4 shot in Massachusetts after World Cup match crowds
item.description: Brockton Police received multiple reports of gunfire shortly before midnight on Friday.
